_publications._publicationTitle: TGFβ Signaling Increases Net Acid Extrusion, Proliferation and Invasion in Panc-1 Pancreatic Cancer Cells: SMAD4 Dependence and Link to Merlin/NF2 Signaling.

_contextSnippet: western blot analysis revealed that the NHE1 protein level was significantly increased in BxPC-3 cells
details: Successfully detected NHE1 protein by western blotting, showing significantly increased levels in BxPC-3 cells compared to HPDE cells
